microsoft_ft: Owned the end-to-end product strategy for Azure's recovery validation program, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized system that sustained 45+ annual drills and drove **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Brought structure to an **unclaimed**, ambiguous space by leading 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service capabilities that reduced operational toil **30%** and unified fragmented workflows.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate**, uncovering hidden hardware defects and establishing a new model for continuous, data-driven validation.

Drove cross-functional execution across engineers, data scientists, and partner stakeholders on 14 recovery initiatives under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Defined AI as a driver for operational scale by building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time **39%** and increasing drill capacity **21%** to deliver scalable solutions against evolving business needs.
microsoft_2023: Drove product adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows by running hands-on user demos and training sessions, optimizing utilization across **14 key teams** and saving 37 engineering hours monthly while informing the broader GTM rollout strategy.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, forming hypotheses around critical feature gaps and translating funnel insights into prioritized requirements.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by setting rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, applying AI/ML to recommendations and cutting lookup time by **83%** across the user journey.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by aligning stakeholders across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, bridging gaps between engineering, ops, and platform groups toward a single goal.

Mobilized a full-funnel product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, running discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target untapped automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil and key metrics across 140+ cross-functional teams in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, navigating ambiguity to deliver a scalable transition without a pre-defined roadmap.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process across a fast-paced, cross-functional environment.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and delivering scalable solutions against evolving business needs.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end commerce lifecycle and managing scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, mapping the full user journey from quote to conversion.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first **go-to-market strategy**, optimizing the website and Google profile across top-of-funnel discovery to commerce checkout touchpoints.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **data-driven** profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, forming hypotheses to identify and seal margin leaks that directly influenced revenue and retention.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocabulary: full-funnel, user journey, unclaimed/ambiguous spaces, unify strategy, commerce, GTM, AI as a driver.
Swapped all titles to Product Manager variants to match the PM-family role.
Surfaced commerce/marketplace and lifecycle framing in Pro Painters and full-funnel language across roles.
Led with strong action verbs and packed bullets to 250-290 chars for max page density.
